course_title: ECOTOXICOLOGY: IMPACTS ON POPULATIONS, COMMUNITIES AND ECOSYSTEMS
description: Focuses on the impact of toxicants on populations, communities, ecosystems, and includes risk evaluation. Includes lectures, current research presentations, and discussions.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: M&ENVTOX/​AGRONOMY/​ENTOM/​F&W ECOL  633or declared in Molecular and Environmental Toxicology, PhD program
